name: J. Zaki
location_detail: Seawoods, Navi Mumbai — open to global relocation
availability: Open to infrastructure, SRE, and platform engineering roles. Based in Mumbai, open to relocation.

taglines.curious: Engineer by day, builder by night

hero_subline.curious: I find it hard to stop building things

contact_taglines.recruiter: Open to infrastructure, platform engineering, and SRE roles. Based in Mumbai, open to relocation.
contact_taglines.developer: Always interested in interesting problems. Best reached over email.

currently: Building a content automation pipeline that turns YouTube transcripts into publication-ready articles across 12 niches. Studying for GCP Professional Cloud Architect. Thinking about offline-first data architecture for mobile apps. Reading about FreeType font rendering for the e-ink reader that's still on the bench.

left_framing.recruiter: Systems Engineer at TCS, deployed at SBI. Three years keeping mission-critical banking infrastructure running at 99.999% uptime for 30,000+ users.
left_framing.developer: I run infrastructure for a Tier-1 Indian bank by day and build automation pipelines, PWAs, and embedded devices by night.
left_framing.curious: Based in Navi Mumbai. Engineer by profession, builder by disposition.

about.callout: Built Path of Supplication, an offline Islamic supplication app used by a small community worldwide — structured a publicly available 22,000-record liturgical database into an indexed schema with sub-10ms search, shipped as a PWA at zero hosting cost.

paragraphs.recruiter: Systems Engineer at TCS, deployed at State Bank of India, keeping mission-critical banking infrastructure running at 99.999% uptime for 30,000+ users. Three years of hands-on infrastructure, IDM, and DR execution — with a team of five to lead and a track record of cutting RTO by 50%.
paragraphs.developer: I run infrastructure for a Tier-1 Indian bank by day and build automation pipelines, PWAs, and embedded devices by night. My stack spans Linux/RHEL server fleets, Python ETL, Flutter mobile, Astro JAMstack, and ESP32 firmware — usually on free-tier infrastructure and always with a bias toward shipping over theorising. Currently deep into LLM orchestration and GenAI workflow design.
paragraphs.curious_p1: I'm an engineer based in Navi Mumbai who finds it hard to stop building things. My day job is keeping banking systems alive for tens of thousands of people.
paragraphs.curious_p2: Outside that, I've built an offline Islamic supplication app used by a small community of Muslims worldwide, a running app with ghost routes and crowd radar, a pocket e-ink reader from scratch, and a marketing automation system for my family's marine parts business.
paragraphs.curious_p3: I also spent a few months coaching engineers on how to talk about their work — which turned out to be more technical than it sounds.
paragraphs.curious_p4: Right now I'm building a content automation pipeline and thinking about what a genuinely useful AI-native workflow tool would look like if you weren't trying to impress a demo audience.

summaries.platform_sre: Systems Engineer specialising in Identity & Access Management (IDM) and enterprise infrastructure operations within banking environments. Experienced in leading operations teams and mentoring engineers while managing mission-critical platforms for 30,000+ users. Expert in infrastructure modernisation, on-premise containerisation, and high-availability systems (99.999%), currently expanding into Platform Engineering, SRE, and multi-cloud architecture.
summaries.management: Systems Engineer and technical coach with a strong foundation in managing mission-critical enterprise banking infrastructure for 30,000+ users. Proven leadership in directing operations teams, mentoring junior engineers, and executing Disaster Recovery drills. Combining deep technical expertise in on-premise containerisation with strong executive communication skills.
summaries.ai_automation: Systems Engineer and automation architect specialising in end-to-end LLM orchestration, GenAI workflow design, and data pipeline engineering. Expert in building secure, high-performance automation frameworks using Python, multi-model API integration, and headless distribution systems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) — Electronics & Communication Engineering
